// libs/modules/{{feature-name}}/src/domain/repositories/{{feature-name}}.repository.interface.ts
//
// Domain Repository Interface — defines the persistence contract.
// No infrastructure imports are allowed in this file.

import { {{FeatureName}} } from '../entities/{{feature-name}}.entity';

export interface I{{FeatureName}}Repository {
  findById(id: number): Promise<{{FeatureName}} | null>;
  findAll(): Promise<{{FeatureName}}[]>;
  save(entity: Omit<{{FeatureName}}, 'id'>): Promise<{{FeatureName}}>;
  update(id: number, partial: Partial<Omit<{{FeatureName}}, 'id'>>): Promise<{{FeatureName}} | null>;
  delete(id: number): Promise<void>;
}

// Injection token — used by NestJS DI and the module provider binding.
// Namespace export keeps the token co-located with the interface.
export namespace {{FeatureName}}RepositoryInterface {
  export const TOKEN = Symbol('I{{FeatureName}}Repository');
}
